sections.heading: Precision Knurled Brass CNC Turned Parts
sections.text: Precision Knurled Brass CNC Turned Parts Junying custom precision brass CNC turned parts with high quality and reasonable prices. Brass is an alloy mainly composed of copper and zinc, as well as a small amount of lead. Brass often comes in golden yellow, reddish-gold, bright gold or silver, different contents of copper and zinc can change its color and properties. It has acoustic properties, low coefficient of friction, low melting point, good corrosion resistance, good workability and hardness, heat conductivity, and bacteriostatic properties. It’s also easy to cast, malleable and ductile. All of these characteristics determine the CNC brass parts are applicable in bathroom fixtures and he...
